task_description: Issue #9: TDD Pipeline Testing, Refinement & Deployment Preparation - Expand test coverage for the complete pipeline, refine constructs, and add multi-environment deployment support with CDK Pipelines skeleton

verification.summary: All 66 tests pass (19 new). TypeScript compiles cleanly. CDK synth succeeds. Tests exercise actual infrastructure assertions - end-to-end flow, input validation, error paths, IAM least-privilege, multi-environment tagging, Lambda config, state machine timeout, and pipeline construct.
